name: CVin.Bio MCP Server
description: Search professional profiles and job listings from the CVin.Bio talent database via MCP.

tools.name: search_candidates
tools.description: Search the CVin.Bio professional database by skills, location, or keyword. Returns matching candidate profiles with work history, education, and skills.

parameters.query: Search term: a skill, location, job title, or keyword

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get the full professional profile for a specific CVin.Bio user by their username slug.
